overall.description: A static nighttime shot of a campfire burning in a grassy field with a tent pitched nearby. The fire provides the sole illumination, casting warm orange light on the dry grass while smoke rises into the darkness. The scene depicts a peaceful camping setting with no visible human activity.

agents.ego_description: stationary near the campfire, watching the flames burn

entered.detail: small campfire burning steadily with orange flames illuminating the immediate area
canvas camping tent pitched on the grass, partially illuminated by firelight
tall dry grass covering the ground, glowing orange in the firelight
smoke rising vertically from the campfire into the dark night sky

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a nighttime campsite in an open grassy field. A campfire burns in the center-left, casting warm orange light on the surrounding dry grass and a canvas tent pitched to the right. Smoke rises steadily from the flames into the darkness, with no other movement or activity in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze over a secluded nighttime campsite where a flickering fire serves as the sole source of light. It begins with a stationary view of an open grassy field, centered on a campfire that casts a warm orange glow across the surrounding dry vegetation. As the flames dance, the light reaches toward a canvas tent pitched to the right, grounding the scene in a quiet, solitary setting. The camera remains fixed as smoke rises steadily from the embers into the deep darkness, preserving a sense of absolute stillness and peace.
